fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ JSON.stringify({ score: $('matching').item.json.match.score, title: $('matching').item.json.title, company: $('matching').item.json.company, source: $('matching').item.json.source_slug, original_source: $('matching').item.json.original_source }) }}

meta.description: Job Hunter V3. Fuentes: JSearch (LinkedIn+Indeed+Glassdoor), Adzuna, RemoteOK, Remotive, Jobicy. Dedup en batch → Insert en batch → Matching → Telegram.
envVarsRequired: SUPABASE_URL      → URL del proyecto Supabase (ej: https://xxx.supabase.co)
SUPABASE_KEY      → Service Role Key de Supabase
TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID  → Chat ID de Telegram para alertas

rateLimit.jsearch: 2 queries x 4 runs/day = 8/day = ~240/mes (free tier: 200/mes — upgradear a $10/mes para holgura)
rateLimit.adzuna: 1 query x 4 runs/day = 4/day — free tier: 250/day, sin problema
rateLimit.remoteok: sin límite documentado, throttle natural de 6 horas
